# Test Brave Search server error handling with invalid API key
env BRAVE_API_KEY=invalid_key
exec go run . --timeout=10s
stdin error_request.json
wait 10s
stdout '"result"'
stdout '"isError"'

-- error_request.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"web_search","arguments":{"query":"test search"}}}
